display.purpose: Reserved for hero sections and major page titles.

body.purpose: Primary UI text, descriptions, and functional copy.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: Duration for smooth, deliberate UI transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid Studio Black button for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.14 0.01 30); color: oklch(0.98 0.01 30); padding: 0 1rem; height: 2rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.14 0.01 30) 80%, transparent); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Soft Ash button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.94 0.01 30); color: oklch(0.14 0.01 30); padding: 0 1rem; height: 2rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.94 0.01 30) 80%, transparent); }

components.name: Card Container
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.98 0.01 30); border: 1px solid oklch(0.85 0.01 30); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.14 0.01 30); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.98 0.01 30); border: 1px solid oklch(0.85 0.01 30); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.14 0.01 30); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.2s; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.14 0.01 30); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.14 0.01 30) 20%, transparent); }

narrative.overview:
SnapCos embodies refined utilitarianism. It balances the functional robustness of a modern SaaS tool with the visual elegance of a premium editorial marketplace. The aesthetic is clean, intentional, and content-forward, ensuring that the interface recedes to let costume photography take center stage.

The system explicitly rejects SaaS landing-page clichés, heavy decorative elements, neon accents, and generic glassmorphism.

rules.name: The Content-Forward Rule
rules.body: The UI must remain monochromatic to ensure that full-color costume photography provides the only true color pops on the screen.

rules.name: The Intentional Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is established through extreme contrast in weight and scale, rather than subtle shifts in size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or for critical overlay context like modals, and even then must be extremely diffuse and low-opacity.

dos: Do use 1px solid borders (oklch(0.85 0.01 30)) to separate content areas.
Do use Playfair Display exclusively for top-level hierarchy and editorial moments.
Do rely on generous whitespace rather than lines to group related items.
donts: Don't use heavy drop shadows on cards or containers.
Don't use neon accents, purple gradients, or SaaS-cream aesthetics.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use glassmorphism as a default treatment.
Don't use identical card grids repeatedly without typographic breaks.
